title: Jet Ski Rental in Tampa: 2026 Prices and Best Launch Points
html:
Tampa is one of Florida's most exciting destinations for a jet ski rental, with departure points such as the Tampa Convention Center leading directly into Hillsborough Bay. Typical half-day rates range from USD 200 to USD 450, and BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators who keep their fleets in excellent condition.

Where to set off in Tampa

The best launch ramps and marinas are spread along Tampa Bay. Tampa Convention Center dock is a central choice, while the Davis Islands Yacht Club basin offers sheltered access.

Further south, MacDill Air Force Base waterfront is off-limits, but the Apollo Beach marina and the Manatee River at Palma Sola Bay provide scenic routes. Out east, the Alafia River basin gives quieter water.

Which boat to rent

  1. Stand-up jet ski for solo thrill-seekers, one rider, from USD 150 per hour.
  2. Two-seater jet ski ideal for couples or parent-child trips, up to two guests, from USD 120 per hour.
  3. Three-seater jet ski for small groups of friends, maximum three people, from USD 140 per hour.
  4. Luxury jet ski (e.g. Sea-Doo GTX) for longer endurance rides, up to three guests, from USD 200 per hour.

If you prefer a larger vessel, consider a luxury motor yacht such as a Fairline model. You can find availability on the Fairline charter page for group outings.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Tampa?

Jet ski rental in Tampa typically costs USD 150, 450 for a half-day session. Prices vary by capacity and season.

  • Shared group tour on a jet ski: from USD 80 per person for a one-hour guided ride.
  • Small motorboat half-day (e.g. Boston Whaler): from USD 250 for up to six guests.
  • Catamaran full-day charter (e.g. Lagoon 450): from USD 1,200 for up to ten guests.
  • Crewed yacht weekly (e.g. Sunseeker or Azimut): from USD 8,000 for a seven-day charter.

For the best value, browse yacht charter in Tampa options on BoatHire24 and compare verified listings.

Do you need a licence to rent a jet ski in Tampa?

Florida law requires anyone born after 1 January 1988 to hold a Boating Safety Education Card. Riders under 18 must have the card and be accompanied by a licensed adult. Operators confirm exact requirements, so check with them before booking.

A local tip: in summer, the prevailing afternoon seabreeze from the Gulf of Mexico can kick up chop on Tampa Bay, so plan your jet ski trip for the morning when the water is flattest.

The high season runs from December to April, when the weather is dry and the wind is mild. In 2026, expect peak demand and slightly higher rates during March and April.

At a glance

  • Price band: USD 150, 450 for half-day jet ski rental
  • Peak months: December to April
  • Trip length: 1, 4 hours typical jet ski rental
  • Capacity: 1, 3 persons per jet ski
  • Currency: US Dollar (USD)
  • Distance: 8 nautical miles from Tampa Convention Center to the Sunshine Skyway Bridge

Questions about boat rental in Tampa

Can I rent a jet ski in Tampa without a boating licence?

You can, as long as you hold a Florida Boating Safety Education Card if born after 1 January 1988, or are accompanied by someone who does.

What is the best time of year for jet skiing in Tampa?

The best period is December through April, when the water is calm and the weather is dry, avoiding the rainy summer months.

How far can I go on a guided jet ski tour from Tampa?

Guided tours often reach the Egmont Key National Wildlife Refuge, about 18 nautical miles southwest of the launch point, and last around three hours.

Are there any age restrictions for jet ski rental in Tampa?

Renters must be at least 18 years old, and operators typically require a minimum age of 16 to drive the jet ski, with parental consent.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Tampa or list your own. If you own a jet ski or a luxury yacht, consider offering it to thousands of travellers by choosing to become a host on the platform.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Tampa and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
